filesystem._comment: Direct filesystem access via MCP protocol — read/write/search files

memory._comment: Persistent knowledge graph — remembers entities/relationships across sessions

github._comment: GitHub API — issues, PRs, repos, search. Set your PAT in env.

fetch._comment: Fetch web pages and convert to markdown — docs, APIs, references

sequential-thinking._comment: Structured problem-solving through sequential thought chains

brave-search._comment: Web search via Brave API — find docs, solutions, packages. Get a free key at brave.com/search/api

puppeteer._comment: Browser automation — screenshot pages, interact with web UIs, test frontends

postgres._comment: PostgreSQL access — query databases, inspect schemas. Set connection string in env.
